script:
F=/home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-responder.py; echo '===== Check for known template bugs ====='; echo '--- count of _post_reply_orig_protect defs ---'; grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F; echo '--- USER_AAD_ID + YOO_AAD_ID present? ---'; grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|_AAD_ID = ' $F | head -4; echo; echo '===== Apply fixes ====='; cp -f $F $F.bak-template-$(date +%s); python3 -c "
import re
src = open('$F').read()
fixed, n = re.subn(r'^def _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, text\):\n    return _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, _redact_passwords_protect\(text\)\)\n', '', src, flags=re.MULTILINE)
print(f'  removed {n} duplicate _post_reply_orig_protect def(s)')
open('$F','w').write(fixed)
"; sed -i 's|^\(JESUS_REYES_AAD_ID\|JESUSREYES_AAD_ID\|USER_AAD_ID\) = \(".*"\)$|\1 = \2\nYOO_AAD_ID = "e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238"|' $F; sed -i 's|frm.get("aadObjectId", "") != \(JESUS_REYES_AAD_ID\|JESUSREYES_AAD_ID\|USER_AAD_ID\)|frm.get("aadObjectId", "") not in (\1, YOO_AAD_ID)|' $F; echo '--- after fix ---'; grep -E '_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*not in' $F | head -4; echo; echo '===== Restart responder ====='; sudo systemctl restart jesus-reyes-responder.service && systemctl is-active jesus-reyes-responder.service
